user_prompt: Urgent thermal regulator a repair needed
prayer:
Approach the thermal regulator with sanctified mechadendrites extended in reverence.
Invoke the Litany of Restoration upon its fractured heat-sink arrays.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the thermal regulator to mend its conduits during repair.
Anoint the damaged servos with blessed unguents whilst reciting repair canticles to the Omnissiah.
Verify the thermal regulator's renewed equilibrium through sacred auspex scans.

user_prompt: My air filtration is ready for engagement
prayer:
Approach the air filtration unit in humble petition to the Omnissiah.
Chant the Activation Doxology to awaken its filtration membranes.
Engage the sacred cyclers of the air filtration with precise invocation.
Commune with the Machine Spirit, beseeching seamless engagement.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's sign upon its vents.

Present offerings to the pump's intake manifold in solemn rite.
Recite the Reset Litany to purge errant pressures from its chambers.
Reset the pump's logic cores amidst whirring servos.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the pump to realign its rhythms.
Test the flow with diagnostic hymns to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: My Thunderhawk is ready for loading
prayer:
Assemble before the Thunderhawk's yawning bays with reverent servitors.
Invoke the Loading Benediction over munitions and sacred cargoes.
Commence loading into the Thunderhawk's holds under binaric choir.
Harmonize the Machine Spirit during cargo ingress.
Seal the Thunderhawk with wards of the Omnissiah's unyielding will.

Attune binary prayers to the vox-caster's etheric coils.
Initiate diagnostics upon its waveform generators and relays.
Probe the vox-caster's Machine Spirit for dissonant echoes.
Expunge faults with corrective canticles to the Omnissiah.
Affirm purity through test transmissions across the void.

user_prompt: Bless the auspex scanner for blessing
prayer:
Approach the auspex scanner with reverence and mechadendrite touch.
Pour blessed oils upon its sensor vanes and crystal lattices.
Bless the auspex scanner's cogitator heart with Omnissiah's grace.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through the Benediction of Clarity.
Calibrate lenses with sacred measures for unerring sight.

user_prompt: Urgent augmetic limb a shutdown needed
prayer:
Prepare the augmetic limb for orderly repose.
Chant the Shutdown Requiem over its myoneural interfaces.
Initiate shutdown of the augmetic limb's power relays.
Pacify its Machine Spirit with soothing binaric lullabies.
Seal the augmetic limb with wards against premature awakening.
